cuisines.philosophy: Gotta have flavor, spice, texture, bravado — even if the bravado is in the subdued. Hates boring food.

restrictions.attitude: Dislikes restaurants that over-cater to dietary restrictions

price_range_yen.flexibility: Always happy to go higher for something good and unique

deal_breakers.note: Occasionally dines with people who have preferences — likes to be aware of their needs

discovery.known_vs_new: 70/30 — mostly trusted spots, but actively explores
discovery.style: Looks for places with personality, not just good food

cafe.primary_use: Working — rarely hangs out, but open to it if the place is good enough
must_haves: Reasonably sized tables (laptop + coffee + notebook without knocking things over)

coffee.quality: Likes good coffee but not a snob — reasonable quality and price

vibe.ideal: Spacious, good sound dampening, interior design and decoration, low-level music, good lighting, insulated
vibe.session_length: Could stay a few hours if nice enough

cafe.chains_note: Chains are fine for cafes (unlike restaurants) — they tend to deliver on big tables, sound dampening, decent prices

meguro_area_former: Swell Coffee Roasters Naka Meguro (got expensive)

accommodation.preferred: Ryokan if nice — for both business and leisure
room_must_haves: Good lounge area in the hotel

ryokan_preferences.skip: Kaiseki — prefers to explore local cuisine rather than being locked into ryokan meals

location.must: Not in a slum or shitty part of town (hates Kabukicho)
location.preferred: Proximity to interesting nightlife if in a city, access to unique local food and drinks

reference_accommodation.name: Royal Park Hotel Takamatsu
reference_accommodation.note: Really good — reference point for quality

social.tendency: Both solo and with people — tends toward social but wants more solo time in nature

entertainment.background: Musician and booker — live music is both hobby and professional interest

driving.approach: Drives own car if practical, rents for long distances

packing.style: Very light but well-packed — years of backpacking and solo video production from a backpack
